title: Kennaye Server Pack
description: The official modpack for Kennaye's Minecraft server! Fun aspects from magic and exploration to scientific break throughs and reaching outer space!
body:
Kennaye's Modded Pack

Want to add a little more to your minecraft experience? Does beating the Ender Dragon, Wither and the Warden not fulfill your needs? We'll this is the pack for you! In this modpack you will be able to explore dungeons and tap into the world of magic! If you are more into science then you can explore through various machines to making survival easy, bring extinct creatures back to life, and possibly make it to the outter rings of outer space. This modpack has something for everyone!

Updates?
Kennaye will update the pack through here so you will not need to add and remove mods yourself or reinstall a pack and loose your keybinds or settings!

Mod Credits

Mandala's GUI Darkmode - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mandalas-gui-dark-mode
